summary: Fixed Mariano Neme's testimonial (key `testimonials.6`) which had two defects: missing photo and fake/dummy text across all three i18n files.
Phase 1: Updated `src/components/Testimonials.astro` — replaced `photo: undefined` with the real Firebase Storage URL for testimonial 6 (MN).

Phase 2: Updated `src/i18n/es.ts` — replaced dummy Spanish text with the real verbatim testimonial: 'Groso total @julian_kusi , yo fui este año a Aconcagua y gran parte de la info de calidad la adquirí viendo el contenido en todas sus plataformas'.

Phase 3: Updated `src/i18n/en.ts` — replaced dummy English text with faithful translation: 'Total legend @julian_kusi — I went to Aconcagua this year and most of the quality information I got was from watching the content on all your platforms'.
Phase 4: Updated `src/i18n/zh.ts` — replaced dummy Chinese text with faithful translation: '@julian_kusi 真的太棒了，我今年去了阿空加瓜，大部分高质量的信息都是通过观看您在各个平台上的内容获得的'.
No structural changes were made — only data corrections as specified.
All other testimonial fields (name, location, initials, summitDate) remain unchanged.

files_changed.src/components/Testimonials.astro: Fixed photo field for testimonial 6 (MN) — replaced undefined with real Firebase Storage URL
files_changed.src/i18n/es.ts: Replaced dummy Spanish text with real verbatim testimonial
files_changed.src/i18n/en.ts: Replaced dummy English text with faithful English translation
files_changed.src/i18n/zh.ts: Replaced dummy Chinese text with faithful Chinese translation

validation.build: PASSED — `npm run build` completed with 0 errors, 7 pages built
validation.typescript: PASSED — Astro build includes TypeScript compilation with no errors
validation.regressions: No regressions — testimonials 1-5 are completely unchanged
